reviews.comment:
Una pena que hayan eliminado las mesas y bancos que estaban en la esquina de la estación. Poca sombra quedó en el lugar.

(Translated by Google)
It's a shame they removed the tables and benches that were on the corner of the station. There's hardly any shade left.
